## Outcome

Describe the user-visible result and link the issue.

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No provider credentials or private session data are read, logged, rendered, or uploaded.
- [ ] Subprocess arguments and environment changes are allow-listed and tested.
- [ ] Unknown provider data remains explicitly unknown.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] Windows behavior considered or tested
- [ ] macOS behavior considered or tested
- [ ] Linux behavior considered or tested

List native platforms tested and any remaining limitation.
